creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
This is one of the coolest art activities to try in Dubai! 🧶

I learned tufting at @mofunstudio - an arts and crafts venue where you can let your creative juices flow! They offer various DIY activities like rug making (tufting), fluid art, acrylic painting and a lot more! 💗

Tufting is a fun task. However, for a beginner, it’s challenging! 😅 I chose an easy design and picked the yarn colors. Realized that I failed on the latter when I saw the final output; not bad for a first-timer though. What do you think? 🤗 

Ed helped me out on some parts and we finished our custom rug project in 2 hours! 🎉 

Save this for your next summer activity in Dubai and tag your artsy friend! 

#tufting #dubai #dubaidestinations #dubaireels #ladyandhersweetescapes #mydubai
